topic: Someone receives a friend request from a childhood bully
raw_output:
[story 1]

The notification popped up on my screen, a stark, unwelcome intrusion. A profile picture loaded, and my stomach immediately tightened into a hard knot. It was Mark. Mark Peterson. The name tasted like old chalk dust in my mouth. I stared at the request, my thumb hovering over the 'Accept' button, my breath catching in my throat. Every muscle in my jaw felt suddenly rigid. What was he even thinking? After all these years, after everything that happened in the seventh grade, he wanted to reconnect? I quickly minimized the message, shoving my phone face down on the table, wishing the floor would swallow me whole. The silence in my small apartment seemed amplified, heavy with unspoken history.

[story 2]

When the chime sounded, I nearly dropped my mug of tea. It was a familiar vibration, but the sender’s name sent a jolt of icy dread through me. It was him. Liam. I watched the screen, my knuckles whitening as I gripped the edge of the desk. My gaze darted to the window, focusing intently on the rain streaking the glass, anything but the illuminated screen. A flush crept up my neck, warm and undeniable. I felt an overwhelming urge to disappear, to become invisible. Should I ignore it? Or should I just… not acknowledge it? The decision felt monumental, weighted by years of awkward encounters and lingering resentment.

[story 3]

I picked up my phone slowly, as if handling something fragile and dangerous. The profile picture was a grainy photo from a poorly lit school dance, and there, there was Mark, grinning with that infuriatingly confident smirk. A wave of heat washed over my face, making my ears burn. I fiddled with the sleeve of my sweater, twisting the fabric until it bunched up awkwardly around my wrist. *Why now?* The thought echoed loudly in the quiet room. I reread the request three times, each time the anticipation of his message making my chest feel tight and shallow. I felt utterly exposed, as if every secret I’d ever kept was suddenly laid bare for his inspection.
